mapper.select: SELECT id, hospitalization_id, charge_date, bed_fee, drug_fee, treatment_fee, total_fee FROM daily_charge
SELECT id, hospitalization_id, charge_date, bed_fee, drug_fee, treatment_fee, total_fee FROM daily_charge WHERE hospitalization_id = #{hospitalizationId} ORDER BY charge_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_charge (hospitalization_id, charge_date, bed_fee, drug_fee, treatment_fee, total_fee) VALUES (#{hospitalizationId}, #{chargeDate}, #{bedFee}, #{drugFee}, #{treatmentFee}, #{totalFee})
